text.tspan: PROBLEM: client wants 'customer with their last 5 orders + loyalty status'
but these live in 3 separate services with 3 separate databases
u2022 LATENCY = max(service latencies), not sum (parallel)
u2022 PARTIAL FAILURE: one service down u2192 entire response empty?
u2192 return partial result with 'loyalty: null'
u2022 OVER-FETCHING: client wanted only customer.name + last_order_total
but composer fetched everything u2192 see GraphQL for the fix
u2022 N+1 RISK: if doing 'enrich each order with product name'
u2192 1 orders call + N catalog calls = N+1 problem
u2192 batch via /products?ids=1,2,3 or DataLoader pattern
u2022 CACHE: composer can cache per-service results independently
